Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: We will learn how to search an area for contacts using limited resources (e.g., without an aircraft carrier at our disposal), how to identify surface radar contacts, how to distinguish neutral shipping from hostile forces, and how other methods of detection beyond our own sensors can come into play.
